reasoning: Today's workout targets poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance by integrating over-unders specifically at 201-218W for recovery and 242-256W for work phases. This builds an underdeveloped aerobic base. Your last ride showed steady effort; now we focus on fluctuating intensity to better handle the demands of the Alpine Loop climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4 sets of 5 min Over (242-256W), 3 min Under (201-218W), focus on controlled breathing and solid form.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
